title: Quantity Surveying Manager (Tender Lead)
description:
We are seeking an experienced Quantity Surveying Manager to lead a team in tendering for building works projects. The ideal candidate will have a strong track record in quantity surveying, tender management, and team leadership. You'll be responsible for driving tender submissions, managing QS teams, and ensuring projects are pursued with accurate pricing and compliance.

Key Responsibilities:

· Lead tender teams for building works projects, overseeing QS inputs, pricing, and submission.
· Manage and develop Junior/Executive/Senior QS.
· Coordinate with project teams, clients, and subcontractors for tender clarifications and queries.
· Ensure tender submissions are accurate, compliant, and meet client requirements.
· Develop and implement tender strategies, risk assessments, and pricing approaches.
· Monitor tender pipeline, forecast, and report on tender outcomes.

Requirements:

· Degree in Quantity Surveying or equivalent.
· 10+ years of QS experience in construction, with at least 3 years in a leadership role.
· Proven track record in tender management and winning projects.
· Strong knowledge of building works, contracts, and pricing.
· Excellent leadership, communication, and team management skills.
· Proficient in QS software (e.g. Glodon, Bluebeam, etc.)
· Experience with Public and Private Residential Housing project, Institutional projects.
· Familiarity with BIM and digital QS tools.
· Candidates with Professional QS certification will be an advantage.

postedCompany.description:
Ho Lee Construction Pte Ltd (HLC) started out as a Sanitary and Plumbing contractor in 1972 knows as Ho Lee Plumbing Pte Ltd undertaking mainly sanitary and plumbing works for public residential housing projects. In 1980, HLC was incorporated and it began to take on general building construction as a Main Building Contractor. HLC had developed core competencies in building construction over the years and had won recognitions from the BCA as well as from its employer such as the Defence Science & Technology Agency (DSTA) and the Housing and Development Board of Singapore (HDB).

The company had diverse into the field of infrastructure in 2001 and had completed projects such as MRT Stations and Deep Tunnel Sewerage System (DTSS) Projects.

HLC is currently graded as Registered Contractors by BCA in the following workheads:

  1. A1(unlimited tendering limit) for General Building (CW01)
  2. A2(unlimited tendering limit) for Civil Engineering (CW02)

The company is also a Registered BCA Licensed Builders in the following categories:

  1. GB1 General Builder (Class 1)
  2. SB (SS) Specialist Builder (Structural Steelwork)

As one of the leading construction company, HLC has over the years garnered a reputation as a builder that provides quality building for both public and private projects. This, together with the adoption of the corporate culture that focus on its people, HLC continuously seek to cultivate a positive attitude among its staff as the main driving force to compliment its business strategies, vast experience and strong financial status.

This also allow Ho Lee Construction to incessantly acquired technology and know how to deliver the most cost effective and efficient building solutions to its customers.
postedCompany.name: HO LEE CONSTRUCTION PTE LTD
